title: ARIES Observatory Visit — Nainital (BVP-OPTICA)
subtitle: To provide demonstrate exposure to advanced observational astronomy facilities and inspire students by experiencing real-world research environments at the Aryabhatta Research Institute of Observation
description: A delegation from BVP-OPTICA visited ARIES, Nainital, where students explored astronomical observatories, telescope setups, and research labs. The visit offered first-hand insight into how observational astronomy, photonics, and optical instrumentation are applied in real scientific research. Alongside the academic exposure, the trip also fostered bonding, exploration, and experiential learning in a unique environment.
highlights: Guided tour of ARIES observatory and telescope facilities
Interaction and observation of research instrumentation
Informal learning sessions during the visit
Visit to ARIES astronomical observatory and dome telescope
Scenic educational trip combining learning and team bonding
